hook.text: You have two identical environments: Blue (live) and Green (idle). Deployment just flips the switch.

buildup.text: Deploy the new version to Green while Blue keeps serving traffic. Test Green thoroughly.

discovery.text: When Green is verified, switch the load balancer. Traffic flows to Green. Blue becomes the new idle standby.

twist.text: If Green has a problem, flip back to Blue in seconds. Instant rollback with zero downtime.

climax.text: The cost is double infrastructure. But for critical systems, the safety of instant rollback is worth it.

punchline.text: Two environments, one switch. Deploy without fear.

quiz.question: How does rollback work in a blue-green deployment?
options: Switch traffic back to the previous environment instantly
Redeploy the old code from scratch
